chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2996 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 13084/2022 2. For hearing of main case 22.05.2025 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.2, which is taken on record. Per learned counsel, finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He seeks that the assessment be finalized in accordance with law, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and in the meanwhile no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent department articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
